login.subtitle: Learning Mastery Support — bridge early gaps before they widen

student.subtitle: Your personalized learning support for this course. {{open}} active topics to work on, {{done}} completed.
student.recommendedHint: Grouped by topic, highest-risk first — start at the top.
student.nothing: Nothing to work on right now — you're on track. New activities appear here after assessments where you may benefit from review.
student.masteryNote: These mastery indicators are a private learning aid to help you focus your studying. They are not a grade and do not affect your course grade in any way — your grades are determined solely by your instructor through the official course assessments.

tutor.intro: A live, one-on-one session with your AI tutor. Work through it — the tutor will let you know when you've got it. It guides; it won't hand you the answer.
tutor.placeholder: Type your reasoning… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)
tutor.complete: 🎉 Session complete — nice work. Your mastery of this topic has been updated.

demo.title: LMS Bridge demo
demo.note: Simulated {{lms}} interface (not affiliated with {{lms}}) — click the menu to look around; the LMS Bridge panel is the real, interactive tool.
demo.wakingUp: The demo backend is waking up or unavailable. Try again in a moment.
